stemHtml: In high density traffic environments, how does TCAS II manage its interrogation of intruding aircraft?

options.a: TCAS increases the interrogation rate for all intruders and prioritises the fastest aircraft.
options.b: TCAS decreases the interrogation rate for distant, non-threatening aircraft and prioritises the nearest threat.
options.c: TCAS increases the interrogation rate only for intruders above the aircraft and prioritises the closest one.
options.d: TCAS maintains the same interrogation rate for all aircraft but prioritises the one with the highest closure speed.
